lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, how does it get fixed?

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: ...The crane...need to...reconnect water line...with spare pieces...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: So how the hell am I supposed to get to the other side?

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: ...some panels...are safe…others...too much radiation...you must only walk on...safe panels...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Spare pieces? You mean spare pieces of pipe?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: At least I’m not lifting the pieces myself...
